title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Investment Banker in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
